title: Expose deadline related fields on DateValue / partially implemented in ItemsQuery
excerpt:
it was brought up here: Questions about the ItemsQuery date filters that date column values do not return deadline related fields. 
A) the status column and optional people column, as well as if a column is configured as…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
it was brought up here: Questions about the ItemsQuery date filters that date column values do not return deadline related fields.

A) the status column and optional people column, as well as if a column is configured as a deadline are not exposed in settings_str.
B) any related value such as on_time, overdue, done_overdue, done_on_time are not exposed in the DateValue.

Bringing this up because the ability to filter on these values seems to be a part of 2023-10 ItemsQuery for Date columns - but there is no way to return the actual values.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @anon29275264,

I have shared this with the team

I will let you know if we have an update!

Cheers,
Matias
